sans.$value: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'
sans.$description: OIQ body font — Figma font/family/sans 2 (Roboto). Used for H6 and all body/caption styles.

display.$value: 'Antique Olive Nord D', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'
display.$description: OIQ display/heading font — Figma font/family/sans 1 (Antique Olive Nord D). Used for headings H1–H5.

primary.$description: OIQ Purple — 12-step primary scale. Anchored on Figma brand/purple (#921acc = step 9, the primary button fill), buttons/primary hover (#7a179e = step 10) and active (#62127f = step 11). Disabled button fill #c47fdd = step 6, disabled label #f3e8fa = step 2. Steps 1, 3-5, 7-8, 12 are interpolated to complete the ramp.

overlay.$description: OIQ neutral scale. Anchored on Figma text/body (#272727 = step 12), text/caption (#404040 = step 10), buttons/secondary border (#99a1af = step 7) and disabled label (#6d777a = step 8). Replaces acorn's sand-tinted neutrals with OIQ's pure grays.

brand-blue.$description: OIQ brand blue — Figma colors/brand/blue. Used for headings and default borders.

brand-purple.$description: OIQ brand purple — Figma colors/brand/purple (#921acc). Alias of the primary scale's hero step (primary-9); kept as a named brand color for palette completeness without duplicating the value.

brand-red.$description: OIQ brand red — Figma colors/brand/red. Used for eyebrow/kicker text.

brand-yellow.$description: OIQ brand yellow — Figma colors/brand/yellow. Brand accent; no semantic consumer yet.

brand-green.$description: OIQ brand green — Figma colors/brand/green. Used for the dark/accent border.

primary.$description: Figma colors/background/page (#FAFFF8) — OIQ's faint-green page background. Acorn: overlay-1 (white).

dark.$description: Figma colors/background/dark (#1D3C34) — OIQ's dark green section background. Acorn: overlay-12.

accent.$description: Figma colors/background/accent-light (#C4D9E4) — OIQ's light blue accent background. Acorn: primary-2.

heading.$description: Figma colors/text/heading (#002487) — OIQ brand blue headings. Acorn: fg-default.

eyebrow.$description: Figma colors/text/eyebrow (#ff4d2b) — OIQ brand red eyebrow/kicker text. Acorn: interactive-primary.

muted.$description: Figma colors/text/caption (#404040) — OIQ secondary/caption text. Acorn: overlay-11.

on-primary.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/label/default (#ffffff) — white label on OIQ's purple button fill. Acorn: overlay-12 (dark).

default.$description: Figma colors/border/default (#002487) — OIQ brand blue. Acorn: overlay-5.

dark.$description: Figma colors/border/dark (#adf533) — OIQ brand green accent border. Acorn: border-default.

bg.$description: Figma colors/buttons/tiertiary/background/default (#edffc7) — OIQ pale lime tag fill. Acorn: overlay-3.

bg-selected.$description: Figma colors/buttons/tiertiary/background/active (#adf533) — OIQ brand green selected tag. Acorn: primary-4.

fg-disabled.$description: Figma tag disabled label (#a3a3a3). Acorn: fg-subtle. (bg-disabled inherits overlay-3 = #f5f5f5; fg inherits fg-default = #272727.)

active.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/background/active (#62127f). Acorn maps active to primary-10 (same as hover); OIQ uses a darker distinct active.

inactive.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/background/disabled (#c47fdd) — a dimmed purple, not gray. Acorn: overlay-8.

inactive-label.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/label/disabled (#f3e8fa) — pale purple label on the disabled purple fill.

secondary-fill.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/background/default (#f8fbea) — OIQ pale cream-green. Brand accent literal. Acorn: bg-default (white).

secondary-active.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/background/active (#9bc632) — OIQ green. Acorn defaults active to the hover color.

secondary-label.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/label/default (#1d3c34) — OIQ dark green on the pale secondary fill. Acorn: on-primary.

focus-border.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/border/focus (#f2b238) — OIQ brand yellow focus ring on the primary button. (Primary focus background inherits button.active = #62127f.)

secondary-focus-border.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/border/focus (#ffffff) — white focus ring on the secondary button. (Secondary focus background inherits secondary-active = #9bc632.)

secondary-inactive.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/background/disabled (#9bc632) — same green as secondary active. Acorn: primary disabled fill.

secondary-inactive-label.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/label/disabled (#6d777a) — OIQ overlay-8. Acorn: primary disabled label.

button.$description: Figma Button/Primary (node 191:608) — square corners. Acorn: full (pill).

badge.$description: OIQ tags/badges use square corners, matching the button language (Figma Tag node 644:452). Acorn: full.

typo.$description: OIQ headings H1–H5 use the display font (Antique Olive Nord D); H6 and all body styles inherit the sans font (Roboto).

heading-1.$description: Figma H1 (node 149:403): Antique Olive Nord D Regular, 60px / 72px (1.2) / 0 tracking.

heading-2.$description: Figma H2: Antique Olive Nord D Regular, 48px / 64px (1.333) / 0 tracking.

heading-3.$description: Figma H3: Antique Olive Nord D Regular, 36px / 48px (1.333) / 0 tracking.

heading-4.$description: Figma H4: Antique Olive Nord D Regular, 24px / 32px (1.333) / 0 tracking.

heading-5.$description: Figma H5: Antique Olive Nord D, 20px / 24px (1.2) / 0 tracking / weight 900 (heavier than H1–H4).

large.$description: Figma Body L (Roboto): 20px / 32px (1.6) / 0.4px tracking. Body text uses the sans font (Roboto) via inheritance.
